remainingWeaknesses: clustered level areas remain present on some symbols
extension coverage warnings remain present on some symbols
wide nearby support/resistance gaps remain present on HCWB and PHOE
extension coverage/spacing should be planned with fixtures before behavior tuning

diagnosticSemantics.label: Clustered level areas present
diagnosticSemantics.description: Multiple audited levels sit within the configured cluster distance threshold.

diagnosticSemantics.label: Limited downside extension coverage

diagnosticSemantics.description: The extension ladder contains no resistance extension rows for the audited snapshot.

diagnosticSemantics.label: Extension enrichment coverage gap present
diagnosticSemantics.description: At least one extension row is missing enrichedAnalysis metadata.

diagnosticSemantics.label: Historical enrichment coverage gap present
diagnosticSemantics.description: At least one historical support or resistance level is missing enrichedAnalysis metadata.

diagnosticSemantics.label: General enrichment coverage gap present
diagnosticSemantics.description: At least one audited level is missing enrichedAnalysis metadata; this broad diagnostic remains for compatibility.
